name: Update
description:
So, first of all, Hi. How are you?

Incase you haven't noticed, i haven't posted in a few months. This was because i was in and out of the hospital for the past few months. I've been officially checked-out since June 23th, and my husband has been taking care of me since then. Social media isn't really my priority, so i haven't spoken anywhere online. Also, i'm not going to go in detail about why or what happened that made me get hospitalized, so yeah :p

But i'm back now! I've still got five days of free time left until i'm expected back at work...boohoo :'3

I'll try and make some more bots, but since i've got a husband, a job, and cats to take care of, i'm obviously not gonna post a lot. Maybe if i try... atleast three or two bots a month.

But yeah... muah. I doubt the 6 people following me remembers me, but yoohoo~
Also, i'd really appreciate it if any of you make requests. I'm not the most creative person alive, so i'm gonna need some help (❁ ́◡`❁)
creator: Dojan
